violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (back door area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026
The (door frame ) in the (back storage) area is in poor repair. Observed holes /damage and rust.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026
